channel.title: Trying to Hear The Music
channel.description: Recent content on Trying to Hear The Music

item.title: Day 1 – Starting this blog
item.description:
Today I started this blog.

I don’t know much yet, but I want to document everything I learn.

What I did

  • looked into Hugo
  • created this site

What I struggled with

  • understanding how static sites work

Open questions

  • how to structure posts?

🎧 Listening: Nils Frahm – Says
